title: Induction of Sucrosomes
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"7936u","text":"Supplementing sucrose in media to induce enlarged lysosomes/sucrosomes","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Plate 5.0 x 10 5 RAW 264.7 cells per well in a 6-well dish.
Remove media and wash with 1x PBS
Incubate cells with 2 mL of DMEM media supplemented with 50 millimolar (mM) sucrose for 16:00:00 at 37 °C .
creator: Devin Clegg
